response.justification: Bogdan has 20 years of broad software engineering experience and some recent AI tooling work at re:cinq, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands a Director-level IC with deep, recognized AI expertise, demonstrated cloud platform architecture at scale, and enterprise customer advisory experience. His current AI involvement is limited to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — valuable, but far from the thought leadership, strategic advisory, and AI platform development at scale this role requires. There is no evidence of advising strategic partners, driving product-level AI differentiation, or the executive-presence indicators expected at this seniority level.
strengths: 20+ years of hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and full-stack domains demonstrates broad technical range
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective (open-source, geo-data platform, still active) shows initiative and independent builder mentality
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq indicates active engagement with current agentic AI ecosystem
concerns: No recognized or demonstrated AI expertise at product or platform scale — AI work is recent, narrowly scoped to developer tooling, with no published research, major AI-powered products, or external thought leadership
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, partner engagement, or executive-level influence work that is central to this Director-level IC role
Cloud depth appears limited to AWS CDK usage at Optilyz; no evidence of cloud platform architecture, cloud strategy, or infrastructure at the scale expected for a cloud-and-AI principal role

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering tenure and builder track record
